name: INDEPENDENT BANK CORP
business: Independent Bank Corp, through its subsidiary Rockland Trust, provides a wide range of banking, investment, and financial services. It operates primarily in Eastern Massachusetts, Worcester County, southern New Hampshire, and Rhode Island, serving small-to-upper middle market businesses and consumers.

exposures.sentence: The Bank s competition for generating loans is primarily from other commercial banks, savings banks, credit unions, mortgage banking companies, online lenders or online banks, and other institutional lenders.

inability to adapt to changes in information technology, including changes to industry accepted delivery models driven by a migration to the internet as a means of service delivery, including any inability to effectively implement new technology-driven products, such as artificial intelligence ( AI );
cyber threats, attacks, intrusions, and fraud;
